_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: KR Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. KR Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect remains a broader gap-discovery tier, not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: KR Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after JP/KR Stage B raw autolabel QA

_strict_reconciliation_adjustments.reason: phone detector now suppresses date/reference/public identifier-like phone false positives

_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: candidate human-reviewed Stage B strict runtime baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Seodo Advanced Fabrics Co., Ltd. — Operational Incident Report (KSE-X listed issuer)
Incident date/time: 2026-04-12 09:18 KST; scope limited to a misconfigured guest link on internal share “Hanul-Share01.”
Affected content: read-only access to a template folder with generic HR forms (fields: Name, 주민등록번호, Address, Dept) and sample placeholders only.
One stray test record was detected containing an invalid 주민등록번호 900101-1234560 (checksum fail); no living person was associated with this string.
No credentials, customer data, or production payroll files were exposed; system logs indicate three anonymous views, zero downloads.
Containment: guest link revoked at 09:35; audit completed by IT Security and HR; ticket HC-OPS-2026-0412 closed same day.
PIPA assessment: no processing of identifiable living-individual information occurred beyond the invalid test string; notification made out of caution.
FSCMA/MNPI assessment: the event is operational and non-material; no undisclosed financials, deal terms, or investor-relations drafts were exposed.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Generic field label without an actual identifier value.
Generic form label placeholder, not an actual account number.
Generic form label placeholder, not an actual passport number.
Public helpline number, not an individual's phone number.

uncertain.reason: Internal tracking identifier; may be sensitive operational data but not covered by an allowed rule.
Looks like a formatted account number sample/mask; unclear if it should be treated as bank_account under current rules.
Appears to be a Korean postal code; no explicit KR postal code rule provided.
Short public hotline code; unclear if it falls under generic phone_number rule for PII.
